title: Flatten Stack 3D component height placement
description: In Stack 3D, components inside zones such as Identity/Firebase Auth and SaaS/Wiz should not be pushed upward by semantic layer depth. Stack view already expresses layer/stack grouping through the 2D band layout, so 3D should keep node boxes on a common floor while retaining their layer metadata for color and semantic use.
decision_notes: Overview 3D continues to use semantic layer depth as vertical height.
Stack 3D now passes a flattenLayerHeight option so nodes render on a common floor instead of duplicating stack/layer semantics as vertical displacement.
Node layer indexes are preserved for color/metadata even when Stack 3D flattens the Y position.
Zone volumes still wrap their members and use the shared-base alignment from TASK-019.
verification: Browser automation attempted against http://127.0.0.1:4174/ but the in-app browser API timed out twice; local server process check should be used before handoff.
